leadText: The Blue Card (Japanese: ブルーカード Blue Card) is a Key Item introduced in Generation II.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Blue Card allows the player to answer daily questions on Buena 's show, Buena's Password , to earn points on their Blue Card. The player earns 1 point whenever they answer a question correctly. Pokémon Crystal [ edit | edit source ] The player can redeem their Blue Points at the Goldenrod Radio Tower for prizes, spending them like currency. Players cannot have more than 30 points on the card at any time. If the player has 30 points on their Blue Card, they can register Buena's number into their Pokégear . Item Points Ultra Ball 2p Full Restore 2p Nugget 3p Rare Candy 3p Protein 5p Iron 5p Carbos 5p Calcium 5p HP Up 5p Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver [ edit | edit source ] The player can receive prizes at the Goldenrod Radio Tower whenever they reach specific point totals. Players cannot have more than 30 points on the card at any time, but once they reach 30 points they can exchange their Blue Card for an empty one. Once the player has hit 30 points, they can register Buena's number into their Pokégear . Item Points Poké Ball 1p Full Restore 3p Protein 5p Iron 10p Carbos 15p Nugget 20p Rare Candy 25p HP Up 30p

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method C HG SS Goldenrod Radio Tower 2F (from Buena )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description C Card to save points. HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A card to save points for the Buena's Password show.
